calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-01-2026 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar May-15-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Dennis Hayashi; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505
Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:38am and concluding at 9:50am.

Plaintiff Jason Levine appearing represented by Edwin Lamar Bradley, Esq. via zoom.
Defendant Nick Rescino Jr. and Rescino Performance, Inc. not appearing.

Court addresses Counsel for Plaintiff re: it's request for interest and it's justification for attorney fees.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

Court examines Plaintiff JASON LEVINE and he confirms statements made by counsel.

The matter is submitted.

Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Plaintiff and its Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Jason Levine, and against Defendants Nick Rescino Jr. and Rescino Performance, Inc., as follows:

Damages: $18,794.13
Prejudgment Interest: $2,780.50
Attorney Fees: $0
Costs: $559.00
Storage Fee: $9,918.29

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $32,051.92

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar May-08-2026 Continued To May-15-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505 - Matter Not Reported

Plaintiff Jason Levine appearing represented by Edwin Lamar Bradley via zoom.
Defendant Rescino Perfomance Inc. not appearing.

This department did not receive any paper courtesy copies of the relevant filings for today's hearing.

This matter is continued to May 15, 2026 at 9:00am in dept. 505 to allow counsel an oppertunity to provide paper courtesy copies.
